name: @forgeax/engine-codec
description: Runtime-safe zstd decode + KTX2 container parse + build-time zstd encode for the forgeax asset pipeline.

fps.reason: codec is a pure-function decode library, no runtime canvas; fps reported by consuming apps

bench.reason: zstd decode + KTX2 parse are asset-load-time operations, not per-frame hot paths; micro-benchmark OOS for Loop 1

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; round-trip correctness covered by codec unit tests + smoke tests in consuming apps

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; codec is a foundational compression layer established in feat-20260706-loop1
